steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined portion explains that standard dyeing would 'run counter to the ecological promise' of sustainable pellicles — it names a problem that drove researchers to pursue an alternative coloring approach. The question asks what function this underlined portion serves.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — To illustrate how the researchers adapted the pellicle approach to overcome a potential impediment to their main goal as presented in the text.: the underlined portion identifies the problem, not the solution. ✗
  • Choice B — To concede that the researchers' main goal as described in the text will be challenging to achieve due to the standard coloring approach being impractical for use on a pellicle.: no comparison is made; only the drawback of standard dyeing is stated. ✗
  • Choice C — To indicate the characteristic of conventional synthetic leathers that makes those leathers poorly suited to achieve the researchers' main goal as presented in the text.: the underlined portion is about a dyeing problem, not pellicle benefits generally. ✗
  • Choice D — To describe a consideration that led the researchers to employ an alternative approach to coloring a pellicle that allowed them to achieve their main goal as presented in the text.: the underlined portion states the obstacle (standard dyeing undermines sustainability) that led researchers to seek a different coloring method. ✓
That matches Choice D — To describe a consideration that led the researchers to employ an alternative approach to coloring a pellicle that allowed them to achieve their main goal as presented in the text..
